message:
test(db): add 43 tests for mail_explorer and s3fifo modules

mail_explorer (17→42): sort AgentAlpha + tiebreaks, apply_filters for
all AckFilter variants + combined filters + underscore escaping,
compute_stats edge cases + unique counting, build_groups empty/labels,
serde roundtrips for all enums + entry/page/stats, importance_rank
edge cases.

s3fifo (8→26): get_mut in small/main/ghost/missing, contains_key
including ghost exclusion, keys() iterator + ghost exclusion, remove
from small/main/ghost, clear, capacity helpers, insert update-in-place
for small/main, frequency saturation at 3, zero capacity panic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
